title: Improved gui
description: Add some little tweaks to the minecraft gui.
body:
______what it does.______

This is a texurepack that changes the orugnall vanila mincraft ui with a different one that changes the ui in menu and in game and add things like transparent,dark widgets,arrow crosshair.

______version.______

1.21.1-1.21.4(the file is for 1.21.1 however the file will work in any version between 1.21.1-1.21.4 and in 1.21.1 and 1.21.4 as well.
